docs.title: Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning Researcher
docs.text: Welcome! I am an undergraduate research assistant at PAIC Lab (Privacy-Aware AI Computing Lab) at Chung-Ang University, passionate about developing AI systems that preserve user privacy.

docs.title: 🔬 Current Research Focus
docs.text:
• Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning (PPML)
  • Homomorphic Encryption for secure computation
  • Federated Learning for distributed privacy-preserving training
  • Model Optimization and lightweight techniques

docs.title: 🎯 Research Goals
docs.text: My research aims to bridge the gap between theoretical privacy guarantees and practical AI applications. I'm working on developing efficient, secure, and privacy-preserving machine learning systems that can be deployed in real-world scenarios.

docs.title: 📚 Key Areas of Expertise
docs.text:
• Cryptography: Homomorphic encryption, secure multi-party computation
  • Machine Learning: Deep learning, model optimization, knowledge distillation
  • Privacy Technologies: Differential privacy, federated learning, secure aggregation
  • Programming: Python, C++, PyTorch, TensorFlow

docs.title: 🏢 Current Position
docs.text:
• Undergraduate Research Assistant at PAIC Lab
  • Department: Artificial Intelligence, Chung-Ang University
  • Research Projects: Diffusion model optimization, secure ML frameworks

docs.title: 📖 Featured Research
docs.text:
• Diffusion Model Lightweighting: Optimizing diffusion models for privacy-preserving applications
  • Secure Multi-Party Computation: Enabling collaborative ML without data sharing
  • Federated Learning Systems: Building privacy-preserving distributed learning frameworks

Interested in collaborating on privacy-preserving AI projects? Let's connect!

  • 📧 Email
  • 🐙 GitHub
  • 📝 Blog
  • 📄 Research Notes

docs.title: About Me
docs.text:
• Name: Junesang Kwon (권준상)
  • Affiliation: Undergraduate, Department of Artificial Intelligence, Chung-Ang University
  • Research Lab: PAIC Lab (Privacy-Aware AI Computing Lab)
  • Position: Undergraduate Research Assistant
  • Research Interests: Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning (PPML), Homomorphic Encryption, Federated Learning

docs.title: Motivation
docs.text: I am passionate about developing AI systems that can learn from data while preserving user privacy. In today's data-driven world, the ability to train machine learning models without compromising sensitive information is crucial. My research focuses on privacy-preserving machine learning techniques, particularly homomorphic encryption and federated learning, to enable secure and private AI applications.

docs.title: Current Research
docs.text:
• Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning (PPML): Developing techniques to train ML models while keeping data private
  • Homomorphic Encryption: Exploring how to perform computations on encrypted data
  • Federated Learning: Studying distributed learning approaches that preserve data locality
  • Model Optimization: Working on efficient and lightweight ML models for privacy-preserving applications

docs.title: Research Projects at PAIC Lab
docs.text:
• Diffusion model optimization and lightweight techniques
  • Secure multi-party computation for ML
  • Privacy-preserving deep learning architectures

docs.title: Future Goals
docs.text:
• Contribute to the development of practical PPML solutions
  • Bridge the gap between theoretical privacy guarantees and real-world applications
  • Develop tools and frameworks that make privacy-preserving AI accessible to developers

docs.title: Skills & Technologies
docs.text:
• Programming Languages: Python, C++, JavaScript
  • Machine Learning: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn
  • Cryptography: Homomorphic encryption libraries, secure computation frameworks
  • Research Tools: Jupyter, Git, LaTeX

docs.title: PAIC Lab - Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning
docs.text: 2024 - Present | Undergraduate Research Assistant

docs.title: Diffusion Model Optimization Project
docs.text:
• Goal: Develop lightweight diffusion models for privacy-preserving applications
  • Techniques: Knowledge distillation, model compression, architecture optimization
  • Outcome: Reduced model complexity while maintaining generation quality
  • Tools: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Homomorphic Encryption libraries

docs.title: Secure Multi-Party Computation for ML
docs.text:
• Goal: Enable collaborative machine learning without sharing raw data
  • Approach: Implement secure computation protocols for distributed training
  • Applications: Healthcare data analysis, financial modeling, collaborative AI

docs.title: Federated Learning Framework
docs.text:
• Goal: Build a privacy-preserving federated learning system
  • Features:
  • Secure aggregation protocols
  • Differential privacy guarantees
  • Efficient communication protocols
  • Status: In development

docs.title: Abstract Algebra Study Group
docs.text: 2023 - Present | Self-directed Learning - Focus: Group theory, ring theory, field theory - Resources: Velog Series - Goal: Build mathematical foundation for cryptography research

docs.title: Homomorphic Encryption Implementation
docs.text: 2023 - Present | Research Project - Objective: Implement and optimize homomorphic encryption schemes - Technologies: Python, C++, SEAL library - Documentation: Velog Series

docs.title: Privacy-Preserving ML Libraries
docs.text:
• Contributing to open-source PPML frameworks
  • Developing educational materials for PPML concepts
  • Creating tutorials and examples for secure computation

docs.title: PPML Framework Development
docs.text:
• Vision: Create an accessible framework for privacy-preserving machine learning
  • Target Users: Researchers, developers, organizations with privacy requirements
  • Features:
  • Easy-to-use API for homomorphic encryption
  • Federated learning orchestration
  • Model optimization tools

docs.title: Educational Content
docs.text:
• Goal: Make PPML concepts accessible to students and practitioners
  • Format: Blog posts, tutorials, code examples
  • Platform: Velog, GitHub, academic publications

See my GitHub profile for more projects and code repositories.

docs.title: PAIC Lab Research Papers
docs.text:
• Diffusion 경량화 기법 - Diffusion 모델의 경량화 기법에 대한 연구
  • PDF 다운로드
  • Abstract: 이 연구는 Diffusion 모델의 계산 복잡성을 줄이면서도 성능을 유지하는 경량화 기법에 대해 다룹니다. Privacy-preserving 환경에서 효율적으로 사용할 수 있도록 모델을 최적화하는 방법을 제시합니다.

docs.title: Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning (PPML)
docs.text:
• Research Focus: Developing machine learning techniques that preserve data privacy
  • Key Areas:
  • Homomorphic Encryption for secure computation
  • Federated Learning for distributed privacy-preserving training
  • Secure Multi-Party Computation (SMPC)
  • Model optimization and lightweight techniques

docs.title: Diffusion Model Optimization
docs.text:
• Project: Lightweight Diffusion Models for Privacy-Preserving Applications
  • Goals:
  • Reduce computational complexity while maintaining model performance
  • Enable efficient deployment in privacy-sensitive environments
  • Optimize model architecture for encrypted computation
